summary: Systemic enforcement layer. Two PreToolUse hooks (convention-guard on MCP calls, mutation-guard on brand/operator writes) and the canonical write_to_context implementation. Closes the gap between Markdown rules and machine-enforced behavior.
notes: Breaking for workspaces that had scripts or skills hand-editing brands/*.json or operator/*.json. After install, any such bypass is blocked. Run validate-resources on every brand post-update to surface lingering issues. MCP calls on platforms without a conventions/{platform}.json file will also be blocked on first call — scaffold the convention from resources/conventions/_TEMPLATE.json or disable the hook temporarily.

changes.note: PreToolUse hook. Intercepts mcp__{server}__* calls, enforces fresh conventions/{platform}.json. Universal by design (regex extraction, no hardcoded list). PLATFORM_ALIASES + PLATFORM_EXEMPT tables for naming quirks.

PreToolUse hook. Blocks direct JSON writes to brands/{slug}/*.json and operator/*.json via Edit/Write/NotebookEdit/MultiEdit/Bash. Allows cp -r _TEMPLATE, mkdir, read-only ops, .md writes, and the canonical .skills/write-to-context.py channel.
Wires both hooks to PreToolUse. Overwrite preserves no prior settings (template clean slate).

Canonical mutation channel. CLI with --path (supports RFC 6901 JSON Pointer '#/entries/-' and legacy '#entries[]'), --value, --source, --confidence, --mode, --reason. Writes target JSON + appends event to .phantom/context-engine-events.jsonl.

Step 4 rewritten. Pseudo-code write_to_context(...) replaced with explicit Bash invocation of .skills/write-to-context.py. Binary rule added: the script is the only sanctioned channel; Edit/Write/python -c json.dump/echo >/sed -i/tee are blocked by mutation-guard.
URL intake section added. Any ecom URL routes to snapshot-brand, no direct scrape or freestyle analysis.
Prepend v2.6.5 entry. v2.6.4 draft replaced (never shipped).
Bump template_version to 2.6.5, released_at to 2026-04-22, summary updated, manifest pointer updated.

post_steps: For each active MCP the operator uses, ensure resources/conventions/{platform}.json exists with a fresh _doc_check.last_doc_read (< 90 days).
Run validate-resources per brand to surface any pre-existing direct-edit drift.
